---
name: Bug report
about: Report a correctness or stability bug
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the bug clearly.

## Affected Module

Example: `src/dex/uniswap_v3/math.rs`

## Inputs

Provide exact input values.

## Expected Behavior

What should happen and why (include references if available)?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## Reproduction

Minimal test case or steps to reproduce.

## Additional Context

Include links to specs, whitepapers, or implementation references.
